sevenDay.synopsis: The IFR has held off so far, but there are some pockets of lower cigs here and there. Radar is also showing a few light showers in the area. We'll keep a chance of showers for the AM/PM periods with rain ramping up again during the N1. Cigs will drop tonight, lingering til mid-AM tomorrow. Tomorrow looks similar with low-end rain chances AM/PM, increasing for the N1. Rain and cigs continue thru Saturday AM, but things will start to improve for the PM. The rest of the forecast period is looking high and dry.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 30 APR - 06 MAY
